diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_source.py
+++ b/inspect_source.py
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+from pathlib import Path

+lines = Path('predict.py').read_text().splitlines()

+for start, end in [(1,120),(121,240)]:

+    print(f'--- lines {start}-{end} ---')

+    for i in range(start-1, min(end, len(lines))):

+        print(f'{i+1:04d}: {lines[i]}')
